server.name: uoink
server.description: Local Uoink helper exposing video and podcast extraction, local corpus search, hook classification, comment analysis, and entity lookup as MCP tools.

claude_desktop.note: Placeholder path. Use the Uoink setup page after install for the exact machine path.

cursor.note: Add as a stdio MCP server. Use the setup page generated command.

cline.note: Add as a stdio MCP server. Use the setup page generated command.

continue.note: Add as a stdio MCP server. Use the setup page generated command.

tools.name: uoink_video
tools.description: Extract a structured corpus from one video URL.

tools.name: uoink_playlist
tools.description: Extract up to 10 videos from a playlist URL.

tools.name: list_recent_uoinks
tools.description: Return the latest captures from the local library.

tools.name: search_uoinks
tools.description: Run full-text search across transcripts, comments, and titles.

tools.name: get_uoink_corpus
tools.description: Fetch one saved corpus as markdown.

tools.name: analyze_comments
tools.description: Cluster comment themes, products, and disagreements.

tools.name: classify_hook
tools.description: Classify an opening into the nine Hook Type categories.

tools.name: get_citation_map
tools.description: Map corpus slugs to source URLs and timestamps.

tools.name: find_mentions
tools.description: Find every video or podcast that mentions an entity.
